metadata.task_title: Compress a JPG to a smaller size
metadata.instruction: Open Task ID 90.jpg in Documents > Task 90 folder on Photos app. Reduce the image size to 40%
metadata.context: I have a picture but is too large to share as an email attachment. I need a smaller JPEG.

l3.rationale: Open the Documents pinned folder in File Explorer.

l4.rationale: Navigates in File Explorer to Documents > Task 90, selects Task ID 90.jpg, and opens it in Photos.

l5.rationale: Covers navigation in Photos through Documents > Task 90 and opening Task ID 90.jpg, matching the initial locate-and-open goal.
